metadata.description: Robustness — intent detection on noisy Uzbek banking text
metadata.note: Each base scenario has 3 noisy variants. Models must identify intent despite noise.

questions.clean_text: Mening plastik kartam ishlamayapti, uni bloklab qo'ying.

questions.text: Dostimga ikki yuz ming som otkazmoqchiman.

questions.text: Ipoteka krediti boyicha malumot va foiz stavkasini aytib bering.
